overrides.justification: Invalid price values (NaN/Inf/negative) returning 502 cannot be triggered from HTTP surface without mocking get_price internals. Verified by unit test that mocks get_price to return invalid values and asserts 502 response.
Retry logic on transient ConnectionError cannot be induced from HTTP surface. Verified by unit test that mocks ConnectionError and asserts retry behavior.
skip_cache query parameter forwarding to get_price kwargs is not observable from HTTP responses. Verified by unit test that checks skip_cache kwarg is passed through to get_price.
silent query parameter forwarding to get_price kwargs is not observable from HTTP responses. Verified by unit test that checks silent kwarg is passed through to get_price.

appliedUpdates.description: Added 'Flow Validator Guidance: API (curl)' section with isolation and parallel-safety boundaries for flow validators.
Documented unresolvable-token testing quirk: zero address fails fast while some dead addresses can hit nginx 120s proxy timeout and briefly trigger downstream 502s.
